title: Children of Lathandar
bodyText:
Descendants of [[lathander]] and Leliana — the bloodline that throws **Aasimar** every few generations (white/grey eyes, later wings, gold-flecked blood). Once a faith community; **half walked away when it curdled cultish** (exclusive-worship demands). **Lily Spells** is a member of the gentler tradition.

> [!dm] **⏸ PARKED TO CHAPTER 2 (grill 2026-07-09).** The Alaric / pretender-demigod / curdled-cult layer is deliberately shelved — too much for [[arc-chapter-1|Chapter 1]]. Held in reserve so the [[pc-eddy|Eddy]]-in-Lathander's-body payoff isn't spent early.
>
> **Alaric** (parked): an Aasimar who, during the Event, falsely claimed he could summon Lathander's help — and when Lathander vanished into [[the-pool|the pool]], convinced the fanatics **he IS Lathander**. Their worship ascended him to **demigod**: grants celestial powers that *resemble* Lathander's light but aren't pure. Prime suspect as **Eleanora's patron**. The pretender-vs-the-real-body (Eddy) collision is a loaded gun — **for Chapter 2.**
